title: steyermarkochloa angustifolia
intro: Steyermarkochloa angustifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to Mexico and is also known as the Mexican feathergrass. Steyermarkochloa angustifolia has been traditionally used in medicine due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing.
